articles.title: Mali’s forces target rebel alliance in junta’s fight to keep power
articles.description:
Army supported by Russian mercenaries launches airstrikes after offensive by coalition of Islamist extremists and Tuareg separatists
Mali’s armed forces, supported by Russian mercenaries, have launched airstrikes targeting a rebel alliance of Islamist extremists and Tuareg separatists as the ruling junta struggles to maintain its hold on power in the unstable west African country.
Earlier this week warplanes targeted the key northern town of Kidal, which was lost when the rebels launched a surprise offensive across much of Mali in late April.

articles.title: The funniest thing about the Trump arcade game is how good it is
articles.description:
This week, a trio of video game cabinets emblazoned with pixel art of Donald Trump and a number of other government officials' faces suddenly appeared at the DC War Memorial. Looking at the cabinets from a distance, it's easy to get the sense that Operation Epic Furious: Strait to Hell (which you can also play on the web) is just another monumental joke erected by DC-based art collective, The Secret Handshake. But when I got up close and actually spent some time playing the new game, it became obvious that Operation Epic Furious is a scathing commentary that also happens to be a loving tribute to classic RPGs. 
In Operation Epic Furious, yo …
Read the full story at The Verge.

articles.title: The promises and pitfalls of personalized health
articles.description:
This is Optimizer, a weekly newsletter sent every Friday from Verge senior reviewer Victoria Song that dissects and discusses the latest gizmos and potions that swear they're going to change your life. Opt in for Optimizer here.
A few days ago, my esthetician was smearing hot wax on my face. The two caterpillars I call eyebrows were in desperate need of taming - as was my lady 'stache. I hate this monthly ritual, but facial hair is a sore spot. Hirsutism is perhaps one of the few visual indicators of a condition that's plagued me for the past decade. Until this week, I've always known it as polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS). 
Normally, I sp …

articles.title: X is fighting Andrew Tate’s attempt to unmask his critics
articles.description:
X is fighting for its users' right to anonymity against the far-right influencers and accused human traffickers Andrew and Tristan Tate, who are seeking to unmask their online critics. 
The Tate brothers filed suit against the owners of more than a dozen social media accounts - several of them run pseudonymously - last year, claiming the accounts engaged in a "Conspiratorial Plot" to defame them. After a Florida court said the claims couldn't be brought against unidentified defendants, they filed an amended complaint against the users they could identify, and a complaint against X demanding it disclose the anonymous account holders in order …

articles.title: Bose’s new Lifestyle Ultra speakers are now available
articles.description:
Sonos has a new rival in town. Bose’s new Lifestyle Collection includes a $299 Lifestyle Ultra Speaker, a $1,099 Lifestyle Ultra Soundbar, and the $899 Ultra Subwoofer, all of which are now available directly from Bose and third-party retailers like Amazon and Best Buy.
Bose Lifestyle Ultra Speaker

Where to Buy:

 $299 at Amazon (white)
 $299 at Amazon (black)
 $349 at Bose (beige)

The $299 Lifestyle Ultra Speaker is essentially Bose’s version of the Sonos Era 100. It’s available in either black or white from Amazon, Best Buy, and Bose, as well as a $349 beige build that’s currently exclusive to Bose’s online storefront. Of all the new Lifestyle devices, my colleague John Higgins was particularly impressed with the smart speaker. It offers a front-firing woofer and tweeter, and, unlike the Era 100, an up-firing driver. In his brief hands-on time with it, he was surprised by how big it sounded for its size and by its crisp vocal clarity.
Like the Sonos Era 100, the Lifestyle Ultra Speaker supports both Apple AirPlay and Spotify Connect, though the addition of Google Cast provides yet another way to stream audio from supported apps. It can also be grouped with compatible non-Bose speakers via AirPlay and Google Cast if you want to play music in multiple rooms, and it’s the first third-party speaker to support Amazon’s generative AI-powered Alexa Plus.
For home theater fans, Bose also introduced the Lifestyle Ultra Soundbar, which supports Dolby Atmos and is now available from Amazon, Best Buy, and Bose. Dialogue came through clearly in our demo, and the speaker’s soundstage felt wide, even if the low end was somewhat lacking on its own. Bose’s new Ultra Subwoofer — also currently available in black and white from Amazon, Best Buy, and Bose — can help fill that gap, though. When paired with the soundbar, it noticeably filled out the missing bass and delivered fuller, more balanced sound.
Read our hands-on impressions of the Bose Lifestyle collection.

articles.title: X agrees to crack down on illegal hate and terror content in the UK
articles.description:
British online safety regulator Ofcom says it has accepted new commitments from X that aim to better protect UK users from seeing illegal hate and terror content on the platform. Under the agreement announced today, X says it will withhold access in the UK to accounts reported posting illegal terrorist content and determined to be operated by UK terror groups and assess "at least 85 percent" of terror and hate speech reported by users "within a maximum of 48 hours."
X has also agreed to work with experts regarding reporting systems for illegal hate and terror content and will submit quarterly performance data to Ofcom over the next 12 month …

articles.title: Middlesbrough want Southampton kicked out of play-offs over Spygate
articles.description: Middlesbrough issue a statement demanding Southampton's expulsion from the Championship play-offs over spying allegations.

articles.title: Spotify’s ‘green disco-ball’ logo has users pondering: ‘Is it an update or awful design choice?’
articles.description: Alongside the temporary logo redesign, Spotify has introduced a new mobile-only in-app experience called 'Spotify 20: Your Party of the Year(s).'

articles.description: Satheesan says he will not be buying a new official car and will use whatever vehicle is available

articles.title: A global centre for peace also emerging as hub for defence projects, says Rammohan Naidu
articles.description: The AMCA project symbolises a new dimension of national security and technological advancement and reflects Andhra Pradesh’s growing prominence in defence and aerospace sectors

articles.title: Karnataka govt slashes beer, whiskey prices by up to 25%; check new rates under alcohol- content-based excise policy
articles.description: Karnataka’s new Alcohol in Beverage (AiB) policy has cut beer and premium liquor prices by up to 25 per cent while increasing rates on cheaper Indian-made liquor. The state has also shifted to an alcohol-content-based taxation model, becoming the first in India to adopt the system.

articles.title: Many parts of Karnataka to receive rainfall over the next couple of days

topStories.title: What are the risks of trying to settle debt on your own?
topStories.description: A DIY approach to debt settlement can backfire if you don't understand the legal, financial and tax risks involved.

topStories.title: Can the NFL's Rooney Rule survive the DEI backlash?
topStories.description: Florida's attorney general says the NFL's Rooney Rule, which requires teams to interview minority candidates for top jobs, is discriminatory. Trump's EEOC has challenged such policies elsewhere.

topStories.title: The best outdoor weekend in Northwest Georgia doesn’t require 'roughing it' or sleeping on the ground
topStories.description: Lookout Mountain in northwest Georgia pairs world-class hiking at Lula Lake Land Trust with the luxury of Cloudland at McLemore resort for a perfect trip.

topStories.title: Barr Pushes Back on Proposals to Shrink Fed's Balance Sheet
topStories.description: Federal Reserve Governor Michael Barr says shrinking the central bank's balance sheet is the "wrong objective." He spoke May 14 at a Money Marketeers of New York University event. (Source: Bloomberg)

topStories.title: Fox News Digital trounces broadcast news brands, along with CNN, MS NOW, NY Times, in key metrics during April
topStories.description: Fox News Digital drove 3.6 billon multiplatform minutes to thump runner-up The New York Times by over two billion minutes during the news-heavy month of April.

topStories.title: Bristol Myers Squibb turns to China to develop new drugs in newest cross-continent collaboration
topStories.description: U.S. drugmaker Bristol Myers Squibb inked a partnership with a Chinese company that some say could mark the next wave of collaboration across continents.

topStories.title: How China and U.S. eased the Middle East oil shock and kept prices from spiking even higher
topStories.description: China and the U.S., the world's two largest economies, wield great influence over the oil market and are using it to help plug the supply gap.

topStories.title: John Krasinski and Michael Kelly reunite for "Tom Clancy's Jack Ryan: Ghost War"
topStories.description: John Krasinski and Michael Kelly join "CBS Mornings" to discuss reuniting for the movie, "Tom Clancy's Jack Ryan: Ghost War," after starring in the TV series "Tom Clancy's Jack Ryan" for four seasons. They discuss the movie, their friendship and how they balance it all with their busy family lives.

topStories.title: Coast Guard releases new photos of sailboat seized in missing American's Bahamas disappearance case
topStories.description: Coast Guard releases new images of the seized sailboat Soulmate amid an active criminal investigation into Lynette Hooker's disappearance at sea.

topStories.title: Trump warns Taiwan not to expect blank check from US military after intense Xi summit
topStories.description: President Trump warns Taiwan not to expect unconditional U.S. military support, saying he does not want to travel 9,500 miles to fight a war with China.

topStories.title: Why is Trump talking about action on Cuba and what could that look like?
topStories.description: Experts don't expect military action soon. But actual regime change is complicated.

topStories.title: How will Jerome Powell be remembered as he exits as Fed chair?
topStories.description: As Powell steps down after more than eight years leading the Federal Reserve, economists say he helped steer the U.S. through historic shocks but misread inflation.

dailyNews.title: Auburn grad who just landed dream job allegedly shot and killed by boyfriend's father in Alabama
dailyNews.description: An Alabama man allegedly shot his son's 22-year-old girlfriend, a recent Auburn graduate who had just landed her dream job as an interior designer.

dailyNews.title: New season of "Couples Therapy" dives into political differences
dailyNews.description: Dr. Orna Guralnik speaks to "CBS Mornings" about the new season of the docuseries "Couples Therapy," which features Guralnik counseling four new couples on how to tackle issues in their relationships, including major political differences and infidelity.

dailyNews.title: American doctor who initially tested positive for hantavirus speaks out
dailyNews.description: The American doctor who initially tested positive for hantavirus has since tested negative and says "there's no evidence that I've had hantavirus."

dailyNews.title: Gina Carano says defending free speech against Disney was worth the cost ahead of Netflix fight
dailyNews.description: Gina Carano defends her freedom of speech stance ahead of her MMA comeback fight against Ronda Rousey, saying everything she said came true.

dailyNews.title: Tracking who Trump is appointing to fill key administration roles
dailyNews.description: Follow President Trump’s progress filling over 800 positions, among about 1,300 that require Senate confirmation, in this tracker from The Washington Post and the Partnership for Public Service.

dailyNews.title: ‘Glaring similarities with Babri Masjid judgment’: Owaisi reacts to MP HC’s Bhojshala verdict
dailyNews.description: Reacting to the Madhya Pradesh High Court’s verdict, Owaisi said he hoped the Supreme Court would overturn the order.

dailyNews.title: Inflation rate projected to hit 6% in the second quarter, top economic forecasters say
dailyNews.description: The recent surge in inflation is likely to get worse over the next several months, according to a survey Friday.

dailyNews.title: Trump says he 'made no commitment either way' to Xi on Taiwan
dailyNews.description: Trump said Xi Jinping had asked directly if the US would defend Taiwan, and he had responded, "I don't talk about that".

dailyNews.title: China will buy more U.S. oil because it is a natural trade partner, says Energy Secretary Wright
dailyNews.description: China relies heavily on crude oil imports from the Middle East but those supplies are mostly  cut off due to Iran's blockade of the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Xi Pitches His Vision for Avoiding Conflict With the U.S.
dailyNews.description: Having fought the Trump administration to a draw, China’s Xi Jinping is proposing “constructive strategic stability,” aimed at drawing lines he thinks the U.S. should not cross.

dailyNews.title: WATCH:  The Rolling Stones embrace AI in new music video
dailyNews.description: The Rolling Stones released a music video for “In the Stars” featuring de-aged digital versions of Mick Jagger, Keith Richards and Ronnie Wood resembling the band decades ago.

dailyNews.title: The funniest thing about the Trump arcade game is how good it is
dailyNews.description:
This week, a trio of video game cabinets emblazoned with pixel art of Donald Trump and a number of other government officials' faces suddenly appeared at the DC War Memorial. Looking at the cabinets from a distance, it's easy to get the sense that Operation Epic Furious: Strait to Hell (which you can also play on the web) is just another monumental joke erected by DC-based art collective, The Secret Handshake. But when I got up close and actually spent some time playing the new game, it became obvious that Operation Epic Furious is a scathing commentary that also happens to be a loving tribute to classic RPGs. 
In Operation Epic Furious, yo …
Read the full story at The Verge.

dailyNews.description: The president left Beijing following a summit with China, during which the two countries sought to stabilize their economic and political relations.

dailyNews.description: The U.S. strategy to choke Iran's economy at sea faces a new challenge as China-linked rail traffic reportedly doubles along an overland corridor.

dailyNews.description: Joe Rogan and Brendan Schaub discuss survey showing how many Americans think assassination attempts on Trump are fake, blaming TikTok culture.

dailyNews.description: Europe faces a transformed NATO as Trump's defense strategy redistributes command roles, troop posture and the burden of conventional deterrence.

dailyNews.title: How Trump handed the Democrats a gift by seeming to dismiss financial worries of Americans
dailyNews.description: Mike Johnson tries to clean up Trump's comment about not thinking about Americans' financial situation as Democrats seize on the viral sound bite.

dailyNews.title: What did Trump accomplish in China?

dailyNews.title: Trump touts "fantastic trade deals" with Xi as Beijing summit ends
dailyNews.description: President Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping concluded their summit in Beijing on Friday with both countries looking to claim the visit as a win.

dailyNews.title: As Powell Steps Down, the Fed Confronts ‘Regime Change’

dailyNews.title: Oil Prices Rise as Trump-Xi Summit Yields No Clear Breakthroughs on Iran War
dailyNews.description: Hopes for an end to the war in Iran faded after President Trump failed to secure a commitment from China to help persuade Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Deported Despite DACA: Dreamers Face Uncertainty Under Trump
dailyNews.description: The administration has said DACA isn’t a right to stay in the United States “indefinitely.” One man with DACA was detained and deported to Mexico in a matter of days.

dailyNews.title: Inside the Congolese Hotel Where Trump Deported 15 U.S. Migrants
dailyNews.description: They were shackled and sent to Kinshasa by the Trump administration. Now they face a dangerous choice: Go back to Latin America or stay in Africa.
